upgrade_flow.title: Upgrade to unlock Wiki
upgrade_flow.description: Unlock public Company Records, version history, shared Company Records, real-time collaboration, and workspace Company Records for wikis, company-wide docs, and knowledge bases with Trinity Intelligence Pro.
